Da: Robin Novotny, CCS <Robin.Novotny@johnsjames.com>
Inviato: mercoledì 4 marzo 2026 15:53
A: Roy Rigamonti <roy@columbiatransport.it>; Bill Orrok <Bill.Orrok@johnsjames.com>
Cc: Thibaut Columbia Transport <thibaut@columbiatransport.it>
Oggetto: RE: FW: THIBAUT 26/100142 JSJ 302600126 MBL 001-20980621 STORAGE DUE

 

Roy,

 

Attached is a list of all the shipments that will have storage charges.  We are already working on trying to get these shipments cleared and released and delivered.  On top of that, we still have new shipments coming in and process.

 

Is your offer to pay 20% of storage just for this shipment or for all of these shipments in the attached list?  Please advise.

 

 

Robin Novotny, CCS

Import Supervisor | John S. James Co. | Atlanta GA USA | TEL: 470.312.2530

Best regards,
